title: Too Much of a Good Thing
section_path: Too Much of a Good Thing
section_path_text: Too Much of a Good Thing
summary:
Main
Image reference: Tanker.jpg | assets/2026-06-15_too-much-of-a-good-thing_img_tanker_e5832ce07803.jpg
The Strait of Hormuz has been largely blocked since late February but despite an unprecedented energy crisis, tanker ordering activity for large carriers has intensified notably this year, especially for VLCCs, the segment that is arguably the most exposed to the extended Hormuz closure. Over 120 VLCCs have been ordered this year, with this number already exceeding the highest annual VLCC order total on record. This adds to already strong investment over the previous two years, taking the VLCC orderbook from around 5% of the existing fleet in early 2024 to 35% today.
